options.content:
# 06 - Category Spending Analysis

**What This Dashboard Shows:** Analyzes spending patterns across expense categories with trend identification to help control spending.

**Key Metrics Explained:**
* **Top 10 Categories:** Highest spending areas with month-over-month percentage changes
* **Spending Trends:** 2-year patterns showing seasonal and structural changes
* **Variance Analysis:** Current spending vs 3-month averages to identify unusual patterns
* **Category Changes:** Month-over-month increases >20% warrant investigation

**How to Use:** Monitor largest categories first as they have biggest impact. Look for trend changes over 3+ months rather than single-month spikes.

panels.description: Top spending categories from the most recent complete month, showing percentage change compared to the previous month

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_two_months AS (
  SELECT budget_year_month, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY budget_year_month DESC) AS rn
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month >= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeFrom()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
    AND budget_year_month <= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
  GROUP BY budget_year_month
  ORDER BY budget_year_month DESC
  LIMIT 2
),
month_labels AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT budget_year_month FROM latest_two_months WHERE rn = 1) AS current_month,
    (SELECT budget_year_month FROM latest_two_months WHERE rn = 2) AS prior_month
),
current_month_data AS (
  SELECT level_1_category, SUM(monthly_spending) AS amount
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month = (SELECT current_month FROM month_labels)
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
  GROUP BY level_1_category
),
prior_month_data AS (
  SELECT level_1_category, SUM(monthly_spending) AS amount
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month = (SELECT prior_month FROM month_labels)
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
  GROUP BY level_1_category
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    CONCAT(
      c.level_1_category,
      ' (',
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(p.amount, 0) = 0 THEN 'new'
        ELSE ROUND(((c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) / NULLIF(p.amount, 0)) * 100, 1)::text || '%'
      END,
      ')'
    ) AS metric,
    ROUND(c.amount, 0) AS value
  FROM current_month_data c
  LEFT JOIN prior_month_data p ON p.level_1_category = c.level_1_category
  ORDER BY c.amount DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT * FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT 'No spending data' AS metric, 0::numeric AS value
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM base);

panels.title: Top 10 Spending Categories with MoM Change

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_categories AS (
  SELECT level_1_category
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month >= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeFrom()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
    AND budget_year_month <= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
  GROUP BY level_1_category
  ORDER BY SUM(monthly_spending) DESC
  LIMIT 6
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    CONCAT(budget_year_month, '-01')::timestamp AS time,
    level_1_category AS metric,
    SUM(monthly_spending) AS value
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month >= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeFrom()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
    AND budget_year_month <= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
    AND level_1_category IN (SELECT level_1_category FROM top_categories)
  GROUP BY budget_year_month, level_1_category
)
SELECT * FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp) - INTERVAL '1 month' AS time,
  'No spending data' AS metric,
  0::numeric AS value
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM base)
ORDER BY time, metric;

WITH top_categories AS (
  SELECT level_1_category
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month >= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeFrom()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
    AND budget_year_month <= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
  GROUP BY level_1_category
  ORDER BY SUM(monthly_spending) DESC
  LIMIT 8
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    CONCAT(budget_year_month, '-01')::timestamp AS time,
    level_1_category AS metric,
    SUM(monthly_spending) AS value
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE transaction_year >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM DATE_TRUNC('year', (date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp) - INTERVAL '2 years')))
    AND budget_year_month <= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
    AND level_1_category IN (SELECT level_1_category FROM top_categories)
  GROUP BY budget_year_month, level_1_category
)
SELECT * FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp) - INTERVAL '1 month' AS time,
  'No spending data' AS metric,
  0::numeric AS value
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM base)
ORDER BY time, metric;

SELECT 
  CAST(transaction_year as text) as year,
  SUM(monthly_spending) as amount
FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends 
WHERE transaction_year >= EXTRACT(YEAR FROM $__timeFrom()::timestamp)::int
  AND transaction_year < EXTRACT(YEAR FROM $__timeTo()::date)
  AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
  AND monthly_spending > 0
GROUP BY transaction_year
ORDER BY transaction_year;

WITH latest_month AS (
  SELECT MAX(budget_year_month) AS budget_year_month
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month < TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    level_1_category AS category,
    GREATEST(SUM(monthly_spending) - SUM(rolling_3m_avg_spending), 0) AS "Above Average",
    GREATEST(SUM(rolling_3m_avg_spending) - SUM(monthly_spending), 0) AS "Below Average"
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month = (SELECT budget_year_month FROM latest_month)
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
  GROUP BY level_1_category
  HAVING ABS(SUM(monthly_spending) - SUM(rolling_3m_avg_spending)) > 50
  ORDER BY ABS(SUM(monthly_spending) - SUM(rolling_3m_avg_spending)) DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT * FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT 'No variance categories' AS category, 0::numeric AS "Above Average", 0::numeric AS "Below Average"
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM base);

panels.description: Month-over-month variance drivers: categories with >10% change and >$100 absolute variance

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_two_months AS (
  SELECT budget_year_month, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY budget_year_month DESC) AS rn
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month >= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeFrom()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
    AND budget_year_month <= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
  GROUP BY budget_year_month
  ORDER BY budget_year_month DESC
  LIMIT 2
),
current_month_data AS (
  SELECT level_1_category, SUM(monthly_spending) AS amount
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month = (SELECT budget_year_month FROM latest_two_months WHERE rn = 1)
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
  GROUP BY level_1_category
),
prior_month_data AS (
  SELECT level_1_category, SUM(monthly_spending) AS amount
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month = (SELECT budget_year_month FROM latest_two_months WHERE rn = 2)
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
  GROUP BY level_1_category
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    c.level_1_category AS category,
    c.amount AS current_month,
    COALESCE(p.amount, 0) AS prior_month,
    (c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) AS variance_dollars,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(p.amount, 0) = 0 THEN 100.0
      ELSE ROUND((c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) / NULLIF(p.amount, 0) * 100, 1)
    END AS variance_percent
  FROM current_month_data c
  LEFT JOIN prior_month_data p ON c.level_1_category = p.level_1_category
  WHERE ABS(c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) >= 100
    AND ABS(
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(p.amount, 0) = 0 THEN 100.0
        ELSE (c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) / NULLIF(p.amount, 0) * 100
      END
    ) >= 10
  ORDER BY ABS(c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT * FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'No variance categories' AS category,
  0::numeric AS current_month,
  0::numeric AS prior_month,
  0::numeric AS variance_dollars,
  0::numeric AS variance_percent
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM base);

panels.title: MoM Variance Drivers (>10% & >$100)

panels.description: Top 5 transactions for the highest variance category MoM

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_two_months AS (
  SELECT budget_year_month, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY budget_year_month DESC) AS rn
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month >= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeFrom()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
    AND budget_year_month <= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
  GROUP BY budget_year_month
  ORDER BY budget_year_month DESC
  LIMIT 2
),
variance_categories AS (
  SELECT
    level_1_category,
    ABS(
      SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN budget_year_month = (SELECT budget_year_month FROM latest_two_months WHERE rn = 1)
            THEN monthly_spending
          ELSE -COALESCE(monthly_spending, 0)
        END
      )
    ) AS variance
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month IN (SELECT budget_year_month FROM latest_two_months)
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
  GROUP BY level_1_category
  ORDER BY variance DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    ft.transaction_date::date AS transaction_date,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(ft.transaction_memo), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(ft.transaction_description), ''), 'Unknown') AS merchant,
    ft.transaction_amount_abs AS amount,
    COALESCE(dc.level_1_category, 'Uncategorized') AS category
  FROM reporting.fct_transactions ft
  LEFT JOIN reporting.dim_categories dc ON ft.category_key = dc.category_key
  WHERE COALESCE(dc.level_1_category, 'Uncategorized') = (SELECT level_1_category FROM variance_categories)
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', ft.transaction_date) = (
      SELECT TO_DATE(budget_year_month || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM latest_two_months WHERE rn = 1
    )
    AND ft.transaction_amount < 0
    AND NOT COALESCE(ft.is_internal_transfer, FALSE)
  ORDER BY ft.transaction_amount_abs DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT * FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp)::date AS transaction_date,
  'No transactions for top variance category' AS merchant,
  0::numeric AS amount,
  'N/A' AS category
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM base);

panels.title: Top 5 Transactions - Highest Variance Category

panels.description: Year-over-year variance drivers: categories with >10% change and >$100 absolute variance

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_month AS (
  SELECT MAX(budget_year_month) AS budget_year_month
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month >= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeFrom()::timestamp) - INTERVAL '1 year', 'YYYY-MM')
    AND budget_year_month <= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
),
prior_year_month AS (
  SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(budget_year_month || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') - INTERVAL '1 year', 'YYYY-MM') AS budget_year_month
  FROM latest_month
),
current_year_month AS (
  SELECT level_1_category, SUM(monthly_spending) AS amount
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month = (SELECT budget_year_month FROM latest_month)
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
  GROUP BY level_1_category
),
prior_year_month_data AS (
  SELECT level_1_category, SUM(monthly_spending) AS amount
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month = (SELECT budget_year_month FROM prior_year_month)
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
    AND monthly_spending > 0
  GROUP BY level_1_category
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    c.level_1_category AS category,
    c.amount AS current_year,
    COALESCE(p.amount, 0) AS prior_year,
    (c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) AS variance_dollars,
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE(p.amount, 0) = 0 THEN 100.0
      ELSE ROUND((c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) / NULLIF(p.amount, 0) * 100, 1)
    END AS variance_percent
  FROM current_year_month c
  LEFT JOIN prior_year_month_data p ON c.level_1_category = p.level_1_category
  WHERE ABS(c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) >= 100
    AND ABS(
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(p.amount, 0) = 0 THEN 100.0
        ELSE (c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) / NULLIF(p.amount, 0) * 100
      END
    ) >= 10
  ORDER BY ABS(c.amount - COALESCE(p.amount, 0)) DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT * FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'No YoY variance categories' AS category,
  0::numeric AS current_year,
  0::numeric AS prior_year,
  0::numeric AS variance_dollars,
  0::numeric AS variance_percent
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM base);

panels.title: YoY Variance Drivers (>10% & >$100)

panels.description: Top 5 transactions for the highest variance category YoY

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_month AS (
  SELECT MAX(budget_year_month) AS budget_year_month
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month >= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeFrom()::timestamp) - INTERVAL '1 year', 'YYYY-MM')
    AND budget_year_month <= TO_CHAR(date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp), 'YYYY-MM')
),
prior_year_month AS (
  SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(budget_year_month || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') - INTERVAL '1 year', 'YYYY-MM') AS budget_year_month
  FROM latest_month
),
comparison_months AS (
  SELECT budget_year_month FROM latest_month
  UNION ALL
  SELECT budget_year_month FROM prior_year_month
),
variance_categories AS (
  SELECT
    level_1_category,
    ABS(
      SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN budget_year_month = (SELECT budget_year_month FROM latest_month)
            THEN monthly_spending
          ELSE -COALESCE(monthly_spending, 0)
        END
      )
    ) AS variance
  FROM reporting.rpt_category_spending_trends
  WHERE budget_year_month IN (SELECT budget_year_month FROM comparison_months)
    AND level_1_category NOT IN ('Bank Transaction', 'Salary')
  GROUP BY level_1_category
  ORDER BY variance DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    ft.transaction_date::date AS transaction_date,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(ft.transaction_memo), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(ft.transaction_description), ''), 'Unknown') AS merchant,
    ft.transaction_amount_abs AS amount,
    COALESCE(dc.level_1_category, 'Uncategorized') AS category
  FROM reporting.fct_transactions ft
  LEFT JOIN reporting.dim_categories dc ON ft.category_key = dc.category_key
  WHERE COALESCE(dc.level_1_category, 'Uncategorized') = (SELECT level_1_category FROM variance_categories)
    AND DATE_TRUNC('month', ft.transaction_date) = (
      SELECT TO_DATE(budget_year_month || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM latest_month
    )
    AND ft.transaction_amount < 0
    AND NOT COALESCE(ft.is_internal_transfer, FALSE)
  ORDER BY ft.transaction_amount_abs DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT * FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT
  date_trunc('month', $__timeTo()::timestamp)::date AS transaction_date,
  'No transactions for top YoY variance category' AS merchant,
  0::numeric AS amount,
  'N/A' AS category
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM base);

panels.title: Top 5 Transactions - Highest Variance Category (YoY)
